All Services

Everything Your School Needs

From curriculum design to digital transformation — comprehensive solutions for schools to build tomorrow's innovators.

01
📚

Curriculum & Academic Solutions

NEP 2020-aligned curriculum designed for real-world learning outcomes and 21st century skills.

  • NEP 2020 aligned curriculum
  • STEM / AI / Coding syllabus
  • Activity-based learning modules
  • Digital content & lesson plans
NEP 2020 K–12
02
👩‍🏫

Teacher Training & Enablement

Empowering educators with cutting-edge skills, tools and certification programs.

  • AI & coding training for teachers
  • STEM pedagogy training
  • Lesson planning tools
  • Certification programs
Certified Hands-on
03
🎓

Student Skill Development

Future-ready programs in coding, AI, robotics and emerging technologies for students.

  • Coding — Scratch & Python
  • AI & Data Science
  • Robotics & Automation
  • IoT & Embedded systems
  • Drone & emerging tech skills
Project-based All levels
04
🛠️

Workshops & Bootcamps

Immersive learning experiences from awareness sessions to full innovation challenges.

  • 1-day awareness sessions
  • Hands-on workshops
  • Summer / winter camps
  • Hackathons & innovation challenges
On-site Bootcamp
05
⚗️

ATL (Atal Tinkering Lab) Services

End-to-end ATL setup, management and innovation mentoring aligned with NITI Aayog guidelines.

  • Complete ATL setup
  • Equipment supply
  • Activity planning
  • Innovation mentoring
  • ATL competitions
NITI Aayog ATL Ready
06
🖥️

School Digital Transformation

Smart classrooms, AI-powered learning platforms and personalized learning systems for the future school.

  • Smart classroom solutions
  • Learning Management Systems (LMS)
  • AI-powered learning platforms
  • Personalized learning systems
Smart Campus AI-powered
07
📅

Annual Programs

Subscription-based weekly STEM/AI classes with continuous assessments and project showcases.

  • Weekly STEM / AI classes
  • Continuous assessments
  • Project-based learning
  • Competitions & showcases
Subscription Year-round
08
💡

Innovation & Research Programs

Build a culture of innovation with tinkering spaces, idea-to-prototype mentoring and startup exposure.

  • Innovation labs / tinkering spaces
  • Idea-to-prototype mentoring
  • Startup & entrepreneurship exposure
  • Research-based learning
Prototype Startup Mindset
09
🏆

Events & Competitions

High-energy robotics competitions, science exhibitions, hackathons and tech fests that ignite passion.

  • Robotics competitions
  • Science exhibitions
  • Hackathons
  • Tech fests
Inter-school National Level
Our Process

How We Work With Schools

01

School Assessment

Understand your school's current level, curriculum gaps and goals.

02

Custom Planning

Design a tailored curriculum and program roadmap for your institution.

03

Implementation

Deploy programs, train teachers and onboard students seamlessly.

04

Ongoing Support

Continuous assessments, mentoring and annual program renewals.
